title: Sectors
description: Sectors Brunaþéttingar serves across Iceland — energy and utilities, aluminium, fishing, hospitals, schools, commercial, hotels, pharma.
kicker: Brunaþéttingar works across every major Icelandic industry.

intro.label: Industry in Iceland
intro.heading: From the Hellisheiði power plant to the capital region's hospitals.
paragraphs: We design, install and document technical insulation and fire sealing for the projects that keep the country running.
Each sector has its own demands — temperature, hygiene, documentation — and we tune the system to each.

valueBand.label: Each sector has its requirements
valueBand.heading: One company — eight sectors — seven service lines.
paragraphs: Our work scales from a single building penetration to a full plant shutdown — same standards, same documentation, same crew.

cta.heading: Ready to start your project? Get in touch.
